content_body: Carolina Ocoee, located in nearby Copperhill, TN, is your premier destination for thrilling whitewater rafting adventures on the Ocoee River. Known for its exhilarating rapids and stunning natural beauty, the Ocoee River offers an unforgettable experience for both novice and seasoned rafters. Carolina Ocoee specializes in guided rafting trips that promise excitement, safety, and memorable fun for all participants.
title: Carolina Ocoee
